AppFolio Integration

January 30, 2026

Sortly allows customers to connect to AppFolio to seamlessly maintain inventory details of work orders into Sortly and avoid double entry across both systems.

  • Connect to AppFolio
  • Using the AppFolio Integration

Connect to AppFolio

  1. Go to AppFolio
  2. Click on "Add Functionality" → "Integrations"
  3. Search for Sortly and select the tile.
  4. Under "Connection Settings" click "Edit".
  5. Click on "Enable"
  6. Click on "Save"
  7. All the inventory from AppFolio would be imported to the "AppFolio Inventory" folder.
  8. All Active Work Orders would be imported as Jobs.

Using the AppFolio Integration

  • Go to AppFolio → Maintenance → Work Orders
  • Go to an active work order and click on "Parts".
  • Click on "Open Sortly"
  • Select the folder you want to pick items from. E.g. "Tom's Van"
  • Add items to the work order.
  • Enter quantity for each item used for the job.
  • Once you start maintenance activity click on "Start Job"
  • Once the activity is complete, click on "Complete".
  • If you have unused items, click on "Return Items" and return them to the Origin Folder. E.g. "Tom's Van"
  • Finally click on "Complete" and then "Go to AppFolio"
  • On AppFolio, add remaining details, such as Hours, Receipts or Notes and mark the work order as Done.
